articles.content: To bridge this computational-experimental gap, we proposed a novel LLM-based Alzheimer’s Disease Drug Repurposing (ADDR) framework, designed to tackle the validation bottleneck by integrating the strengths of multiple graph models with the reasoning capabilities of LLMs. Our systematic approach addresses three central challenges.
